_comment: TEMPLATE ONLY. The real file must NOT live in this public repo — it belongs only in the private repo the Worker reads from (see access-control/README.md). Every condition's 'field' must be one of the canonical whoami fields loader.js sends: username, email, country, insertSite, langcode, displayName. 'grants' arrays replace the old single 'tier' string — a user can hold more than one at once (e.g. ["user","dev","beta_0"]). 'beta_0' is a wildcard meaning 'all betas'; any other 'beta_N' gates one specific feature. Omitting 'grants' defaults to ["user"].
